EmailTemplate.name: GC 1
EmailTemplate.subject: Policy Payment Update
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
As agreed when you purchased your policy, we attempted to take payment on [insert date here]. Unfortunately, this payment was unsuccessful.
We will automatically re-attempt this payment within the next few days, please ensure that you have funds available.
Please note that if we are unable to take payment for your policy then this may result in your policy being cancelled.
If you wish to discuss this, please feel free to contact us on 01242 808740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Accounts Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
